findings.description: PascalCase class name `UserInfoTempEntity` is used in the s1 code example but is absent from s1 hints.
PascalCase class name `RM11AC0102ResponseForm` appears in both `onReceive` (s1) and `onError` (s2) code examples but is absent from the hints of both sections.
findings.source_evidence: RM11AC0102ResponseForm resForm = new RM11AC0102ResponseForm(); (appears in both onReceive and onError code blocks)
